{"query":"Supreme Court Biden administration ghost guns regulation oral arguments status decision 2024","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1698,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.scotusblog.com/2025/03/supreme-court-upholds-regulation-of-ghost-guns/","title":"Supreme Court upholds regulation on “ghost guns” | SCOTUSblog","content":"The Supreme Court on Wednesday upheld a Biden-era rule regulating so-called “ghost guns” – untraceable weapons without serial numbers, assembled from components or kits that can be bought online.
Court of Appeals for the 5th Circuit largely upheld that decision, a divided Supreme Court put the district judge’s order on hold, allowing the Biden administration to enforce the rule while it appealed."},{"url":"https://www.cbsnews.com/news/supreme-court-legality-biden-ghost-guns-rule/","title":"Supreme Court to weigh legality of Biden administration's ghost guns rule - CBS News","content":"In that instance, the Supreme Court's conservative majority invalidated the regulation that outlawed the devices, finding that the ATF exceeded its authority by issuing a rule that classified a bump stock as a "machine gun."
But legal experts say the Supreme Court's ruling four months ago may not be a harbinger of whether the ghost gun regulation will fall, and in this case, Chief Justice John Roberts and Justice Amy Coney Barrett, two members of the court's conservative wing, will be the key members to watch.
In New York, for example, ghost-gun recoveries dropped last year for the first time in four years, and in Baltimore, they decreased in 2023 for the first time since 2019.
In August 2023, the high court divided 5-4 in agreeing to halt the district court's order striking down the ghost gun rule.
Because four conservative justices — Clarence Thomas, Samuel Alito, Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh — noted their opposition to letting the ATF enforce the regulation last year, he said it's a "pretty clear indication" they would vote to uphold the 5th Circuit's ruling invalidating the measure.
A decision is expected by the end of June 2025."},{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9qv5e13e7do","title":"Supreme Court signals openness to Biden's 'ghost gun' crackdown","content":"The US Supreme Court signalled its willingness to uphold a major gun control policy implemented by the Biden administration that regulates so-called "ghost guns" in the same way as other firearms."},{"url":"https://apnews.com/article/supreme-court-ghost-guns-bf404db1d4ece56203c8748b2544dc02","title":"Supreme Court upholds Biden ghost guns rule | AP News","content":"WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court on Wednesday upheld a Biden administration regulation on the nearly impossible-to-trace weapons called ghost guns, clearing the way for continued serial numbers, background checks and age verification requirements for buying the kits online.
It comes after President Donald Trump ordered a review of federal gun policy that could undermine or reverse regulations championed by his predecessor.
The court previously expanded Second Amendment rights with a finding that modern gun regulations must fit within historical traditions."},{"url":"https://www.courthousenews.com/supreme-court-pauses-block-on-ghost-gun-rules-again/","title":"Supreme Court re-lifts block of ghost gun rules | Courthouse News Service","content":"WASHINGTON (CN) — The Supreme Court will again allow the Biden administration to enforce regulations on ghost guns, agreeing on Friday to block a lower court pause on the rules.
“The district court and the Fifth Circuit have effectively countermanded this court’s authoritative determination about the status quo that should prevail during appellate proceedings in this case,” U.S.
“In so doing, the lower courts openly relied on arguments that this court had necessarily rejected to grant relief that this court had withheld."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Supreme Court Biden administration ghost guns regulation oral arguments status decision 2024","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/4143872-supreme-court-revives-biden-ghost-gun-restrictions","title":"Supreme Court revives Biden's ghost gun restrictions","content":"The Supreme Court revived the Biden administration's restrictions on so-called ghost guns in a 5-4 emergency ruling Tuesday.","score":0.6266047,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/26/us/politics/supreme-court-ghost-guns.html?eafs_enabled=false","title":"Supreme Court Upholds Biden Administration's Limits on ' ...","content":"The Supreme Court on Wednesday upheld federal restrictions aimed at curtailing access to kits that can be easily assembled into homemade, nearly untraceable","score":0.595987,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.scotusblog.com/2025/03/supreme-court-upholds-regulation-of-ghost-guns","title":"Supreme Court upholds regulation on “ghost guns”","content":"By a vote of 7-2, the justices held that the Gun Control Act of 1968 allows the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives to regulate at least some ghost guns, although they left open the possibility that the rule might not apply in individual challenges to particular ghost guns. The Gun Control Act defines a “firearm” as “any weapon … which will or is designed to or may readily be converted to expel a projectile by the action of an explosive,” including “the frame or receiver of any such weapon.”. The ATF contended that the 2022 rule was consistent with the language of the law because it defines “firearm” to include products, such as gun kits, that can be converted into an operational gun or a functional frame (the basic structure of the gun) or receiver (the part of the gun that houses the firing mechanism).","score":0.5010992,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c9qv5e13e7do","title":"Supreme Court signals openness to Biden's 'ghost gun' ...","content":"The US Supreme Court signalled its willingness to uphold a major gun control policy implemented by the Biden administration that regulates","score":0.49846253,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zUMrhYnJxvw","title":"What comes next in court battles over ghost guns following ...","content":"The Supreme Court has given the Biden administration a temporary green light to crack down on ghost guns -- firearms that don't have serial","score":0.49406826,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.84,"request_id":"b3cf304b-fcb8-4f1a-8e37-0e7037b102de"}
